title: 职业发展：面试与成长
method: 学习 -> 测验 -> 跟读 -> 通过后进入下一句
sources: Manual curation; career communication patterns adapted for practical interview and workplace-growth speaking.

units.phrase: I have three years of experience in customer operations.
units.meaningZh: 我有三年的客户运营经验。
units.exampleEn: I have three years of experience in customer operations, with a focus on improving response time.
units.exampleZh: 我有三年的客户运营经验，重点是提升响应速度。
units.commonMistakeZh: 不要说 I have three years experience about customer。experience in 是更自然的搭配。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合面试开场、简历说明、职业介绍，把年限和方向说清楚。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文说你有某领域三年经验。
quiz.sampleAnswer: I have three years of experience in customer operations.

units.phrase: One of my strengths is solving problems under pressure.
units.meaningZh: 我的优势之一是在压力下解决问题。
units.exampleEn: One of my strengths is solving problems under pressure, especially when customers need a quick answer.
units.exampleZh: 我的优势之一是在压力下解决问题，尤其是客户需要快速答复时。
units.commonMistakeZh: 不要说 my advantage is solve problem。strength 更适合描述个人优势，solving 要用动名词。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合面试回答优势、述职、晋升沟通。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文表达你的优势之一是在压力下解决问题。
quiz.sampleAnswer: One of my strengths is solving problems under pressure.

units.phrase: I helped reduce the response time by twenty percent.
units.meaningZh: 我帮助把响应时间降低了 20%。
units.exampleEn: I helped reduce the response time by twenty percent by improving our reply templates.
units.exampleZh: 我通过优化回复模板，帮助把响应时间降低了 20%。
units.commonMistakeZh: 不要只说 I made it better。面试里要用具体结果，reduce by twenty percent 很有说服力。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合讲项目成果、简历亮点、绩效复盘。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文说你帮助把响应时间降低了 20%。
quiz.sampleAnswer: I helped reduce the response time by twenty percent.

units.phrase: What would be the top priority for this role in the first three months?
units.meaningZh: 这个岗位前三个月最重要的优先事项是什么？
units.exampleEn: What would be the top priority for this role in the first three months? I would like to understand the expectations clearly.
units.exampleZh: 这个岗位前三个月最重要的优先事项是什么？我想清楚了解期望。
units.commonMistakeZh: 不要只问 what should I do。top priority for this role 更专业。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合面试尾声反问，用来了解岗位目标和考核重点。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文问这个岗位前三个月的首要重点。
quiz.sampleAnswer: What would be the top priority for this role in the first three months?

units.phrase: Could you share any feedback on my interview?
units.meaningZh: 你能分享一下对我面试表现的反馈吗？
units.exampleEn: Could you share any feedback on my interview? I would like to keep improving.
units.exampleZh: 你能分享一下对我面试表现的反馈吗？我想持续改进。
units.commonMistakeZh: 不要说 tell me my interview problem。feedback on my interview 更礼貌也更专业。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合面试后、内部转岗、模拟面试后请求反馈。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文请求对方面试反馈。
quiz.sampleAnswer: Could you share any feedback on my interview?

units.phrase: Could you tell me the salary range for this position?
units.meaningZh: 你能告诉我这个岗位的薪资范围吗？
units.exampleEn: Could you tell me the salary range for this position? I want to make sure our expectations are aligned.
units.exampleZh: 你能告诉我这个岗位的薪资范围吗？我想确认双方期望一致。
units.commonMistakeZh: 不要直接说 how much money you give。salary range for this position 更专业。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合面试中后段或 HR 沟通阶段，语气保持礼貌和职业化。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文询问这个岗位的薪资范围。
quiz.sampleAnswer: Could you tell me the salary range for this position?

units.phrase: I am looking for a role where I can keep learning and take on more responsibility.
units.meaningZh: 我在寻找一个能持续学习并承担更多责任的岗位。
units.exampleEn: I am looking for a role where I can keep learning and take on more responsibility over time.
units.exampleZh: 我在寻找一个能持续学习，并随着时间承担更多责任的岗位。
units.commonMistakeZh: 不要说 I want bigger job。take on more responsibility 更成熟职业化。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合解释求职动机、职业规划、内部晋升意愿。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文表达你想找一个能持续学习并承担更多责任的岗位。
quiz.sampleAnswer: I am looking for a role where I can keep learning and take on more responsibility.

units.phrase: I wanted to follow up on the next steps.
units.meaningZh: 我想跟进一下后续流程。
units.exampleEn: I wanted to follow up on the next steps. Please let me know if you need any additional information.
units.exampleZh: 我想跟进一下后续流程。如果需要任何补充信息，请告诉我。
units.commonMistakeZh: 不要说 ask next。follow up on the next steps 是面试后邮件或消息常用表达。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合面试后邮件、HR 消息、内部申请进度跟进。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文说你想跟进后续流程。
quiz.sampleAnswer: I wanted to follow up on the next steps.
